summary: Completed Iteration 7 testing of MemoraAI Mobile Owner Dashboard. All frontend features verified: mobile-first design with bottom navigation (5 tabs), Dashboard tab with greeting, 4 KPI cards, AI Auto Reply card, 6 Quick Actions, category widgets. Bookings tab with status summary and appointments list. Reports tab with KPIs, activity chart, top services, customer insights. More tab with profile card, 8 menu items, logout button. Backend: 14/15 APIs passing (WhatsApp CRM leads endpoint returns 404 but handled gracefully in frontend).

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - not implemented. Frontend handles gracefully with empty array fallback.

critical_code_review_comments: MobileOwnerDashboard.js line 243: Calls /api/whatsapp-crm/leads which doesn't exist. Consider implementing this endpoint or removing the call.

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - WhatsApp CRM leads endpoint not implemented)

context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI Iteration 7 Mobile Owner Dashboard testing complete. All features verified: 1) Mobile-first dashboard with data-testid='mobile-owner-dashboard'. 2) Bottom navigation with 5 tabs (Dashboard, Chats, Bookings, Reports, More) - active tab highlighted in amber. 3) Dashboard tab: greeting 'Hi, {userName}!', 4 KPI cards (Today Chats, Pending Replies, New Bookings, Revenue with trends), AI Auto Reply card showing category expertise, 6 Quick Actions (Upload Content, Send Notification, New Booking, Broadcast, View Leads, Hot Sales), category widgets. 4) Chats tab: shows WhatsApp leads (empty state handled gracefully). 5) Bookings tab: status summary (Upcoming, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled), filter tabs, appointments list with complete/cancel actions. 6) Reports tab: KPI cards, Activity chart (7 days), Top Services, Customer Insights. 7) More tab: profile card with user info and category badge, 8 menu items, logout button. Login flow: /login -> 'Login with Password' -> phone=8888888888, password=admin123 -> Login. Use mobile viewport (420x900) for testing.
